NEOW: Taking 'Lose all Gold, choose a rare card'. Resource ordering is HP > deck quality > gold; 99g buys at most one shop item, while a rare pick (choice of 3) has a strong chance at a run-shaping card: Reaper (healing, the #1 Ironclad gap), Feed, Immolate, Impervious, Offering. Boss relic swap is too risky at A9 (losing Burning Blood + possible Sozu/Mark of Pain). 1-HP fights only save ~10-15 HP across three easy Act 1 fights. WIN%: 55% (baseline A9 Ironclad with knowledge base)

BOSS: The Guardian, 240 HP, entering at 80/80. PLAN: Inflame early on a free turn (Charging Up). Block the Fierce Bash (32) and Whirlwind (5x4) turns; deal damage on Charging Up/Vent Steam turns. Mode Shift at 30/40/50 cumulative — use burst (Carnage 22, Immolate 23, Fiend Fire, TC+Phrog Vuln x1.75) to cancel big attacks mid-cycle. In Defensive Mode block before attacking into Sharp Hide. WIN%: 55% (+5) — full HP, strong burst, 2 elites cleared

events.text: RECALL -- Time Eater, layer:heuristics, bosses/Time Eater

events.reasoning: TIME EATER PLAN (71/76): ~700 effective HP. Card count discipline: track X/12 every play, 4-5 big cards/turn max (Choker caps 6 anyway). Bludgeon+ 42 / Immolate+ 30 / Carnage are ideal Time Warp plays. Inflame x2 + Metallicize early. NO debuffs right before Haste (fires at <=50%, cleanses + heals to 50% + 32 blk) — push through the threshold with raw damage, re-debuff after. Stone Calendar T7 = free 52. Fairy = insurance, Snecko Oil = emergency draw. WIN%: 65%
